# PERF-71 negative: relation is Preloaded up front
lang: go
file: PERF-071-safe.go
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Orders []Order
}

type Order struct {
	gorm.Model
	UserID uint
}

func ListUserOrders(db *gorm.DB) {
	var users []User
	db.Preload("Orders").Find(&users)
	for _, u := range users {
		_ = u.Orders
	}
}
